primary_catalyst.title: 年报披露窗口（已公告延期至3月19日）
primary_catalyst.why_it_matters: 年报披露是7个交易日内明确的事件窗口，叠加近期强势资金博弈与龙虎榜机构净买入，容易触发业绩/指引超预期带来的二次加速。

target.bear_case_note: 若3/19年报披露不及预期或出现风险提示/监管问询，且量能衰竭跌破MA20附近，则10%上行概率显著下降。

risk_factors: 年报延期本身可能反映披露复杂度/不确定性，若出现风险提示或业绩不及预期易引发回撤
高波动（5日年化波动>100%）下，追高容易遭遇涨停打开后的快速回撤
data_gaps: No verified 5-day return to enforce >20% exclusion filter
Dragon Tiger trade_date missing in packet (timing precision reduced)

primary_top5.debate_reasoning: Bull evidence on trend/volume confirmation and strong Dragon Tiger net inflow supports continuation odds, but the move is already abnormal and crowded, with elevated volatility and an annual report disclosure (postponed to 2026-03-19) landing inside the 7-trading-day window. Probability-weighted outcomes look more symmetric (sharp pullback risk comparable to further upside), making risk/reward less attractive for a fresh 7-day ≥10% call.
key_risks: Event/catalyst risk: annual report disclosure postponed to 2026-03-19, increasing uncertainty and potential sell-the-news volatility within the target window
Crowded momentum + high volatility regime (2-day deviation >20%, RSI near overbought, very high 5d realized vol) raising odds of a fast mean-reversion drawdown
key_catalysts: Sustained institutional/active flow support (Dragon Tiger net buy ~1.72B CNY) enabling another momentum leg if risk-on persists
Technical continuation setup: price above MA10/20/50 with volume confirmation (3d/20d volume ratio ~1.96) supporting breakout/hold of trend supports
